tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: The group is leaving soon for a social event, but my midterm is tomorrow and I still need about two more hours to finish reviewing.
I have informed Mina I am skipping the event to focus on my exam prep, aligning with my need to finish reviewing before tomorrow's midterm.
I successfully increased my study progress from 0.60 to 0.78, but I missed the window to go out with friends.
My study progress reached 0.92 after two hours, significantly reducing the remaining work for tomorrow's midterm.
I declined Mina's invitation at 00:30 to protect my remaining energy and focus on finishing my exam prep.
I woke up fully rested with no sleep debt, giving me maximum energy to tackle the final stretch of my midterm preparation.
My study is now complete as progress hit 1.00 right before the midterm begins, so I am fully prepared.
With the midterm complete, I informed Mina I cannot attend the club tonight, freeing me to rest after a successful study session.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances goal g1 by ensuring high energy for tomorrow's exam. Since I already messaged Mina to decline the club event, attending is no longer viable; sleeping now maximizes recovery before the deadline.
